# scripts/agent_supervisor_http.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:00:10Z

## Purpose
Small HTTP monitor for live agent supervisor data.

This is intentionally lightweight: it exposes the same Redis-backed report used
by scripts/agent_supervisor.py so the frontend /agent-supervisor page can show
live data even when the full FastAPI backend is not running on this checkout.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import argparse
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import sys
- from `http.server` import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, ThreadingHTTPServer
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `urllib.parse` import parse_qs, urlparse
- from `_` import agent_supervisor

## Inputs
- CLI args: --host, --port, --redis-url

## Process
### Classes
- `Handler`: (no docstring)
### Functions
- `main()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
